title: Lagarinthus diversus
taxonomy: Lagarinthus diversus is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. The family Rubiaceae is a large and diverse group of plants commonly known as the coffee or madder family. This family is a part of the order Gentianales, which is a group of flowering plants that also includes the families Apocynaceae and Loganiaceae. The order Gentianales is a part of the clade Asterids, which is a large group of flowering plants that also includes the families Campanulaceae and Goodeniaceae.
